subject: Henderson kitchen materials  -  October invoice INV-BX-44218
snippet: Subtotal materials: $4,800.00 against PO HMUR-2026-09-11 for the Elmwood Ave (Henderson) kitchen...
body:
Hi Jessica and Mark,

Attached invoice INV-BX-44218 for the Henderson kitchen materials (PO HMUR-2026-09-11). Subtotal materials: $4,800.00. The original estimate of $3,200 came in under by approximately $1,600 due to the copper L pipe Q4 increase + the addition of the Delta touch faucet at client request mid-job.

Net 30 from invoice date.

 -  Baxter's Plumbing Supply

subject: October statement  -  pricing reminder copper L pipe schedule
snippet: October statement attached. Pricing reminder: copper L pipe pricing reflected the Q4 increase. 3/4" $5.12/ft (was $4.20) +22%...
body:
October statement attached. Pricing reminder: as we communicated in the Sep 1 letter, copper L pipe pricing reflected the Q4 increase. For your reference our current schedule:

Copper L pipe schedule (effective September 1, 2026)
- 3/4"   $5.12/ft   (was $4.20)  +22%
- 1/2"   $4.18/ft   (was $3.42)  +22%

The increase reflects mill-side movement across Q3. Any open estimates dated before Sep 1 that quoted copper should be reviewed before invoicing.

 -  Atlantic Building Materials

subject: 2027 GL + WC renewal preliminary indications
snippet: Preliminary numbers for the 2027 renewal cycle on the GL/WC bundle. +15.3% GL, +14.7% WC...
body:
Mark,

Preliminary numbers for the 2027 renewal cycle on the GL/WC bundle. As you know, the carrier did a class-code review across the trades book in October, and the inputs they used assume a payroll growth path of roughly 18% off the 2025 baseline. With that assumption baked in, the preliminary indication came back at:

- General Liability:    $4,820 (up from $4,180, +15.3%)
- Workers Compensation: $7,940 (up from $6,920, +14.7%)

Important caveat: the +18% payroll assumption was derived from a Q2 conversation and not refreshed for actual Q3 and Q4 numbers. If actual payroll comes in materially under that, the indication should soften. Send me a Gusto YTD pull and I can push back on it.

Renewal effective Jan 1, 2027. Need executed paperwork by Dec 15.

 -  Doug Casey, Coastline Insurance

subject: Murray crew dinner  -  Friday Dec 18 confirmed back room

body:
Mark,

Preliminary numbers for the 2027 renewal cycle on the GL/WC bundle. As you know, the carrier did a class-code review across the trades book in October, and the inputs they used assume a payroll growth path of roughly 18% off the 2025 baseline. With that assumption baked in, the preliminary indication came back at:

- General Liability:    $4,820 (up from $4,180, +15.3%)
- Workers Compensation: $7,940 (up from $6,920, +14.7%)

Important caveat: the +18% payroll assumption was derived from a Q2 conversation and not refreshed for actual Q3 and Q4 numbers. If actual payroll comes in materially under that, the indication should soften. Send me a Gusto YTD pull and I can push back on it.

Renewal effective Jan 1, 2027. Need executed paperwork by Dec 15.

 -  Doug Casey, Coastline Insurance

Preliminary numbers for the 2027 renewal cycle on the GL/WC bundle. Important caveat: the +18% payroll assumption was derived from a Q2 conversation and not refreshed for actual Q3 and Q4 numbers. If actual payroll comes in materially under that, the indication should soften. Send me a Gusto YTD pull and I can push back on it.

Renewal effective Jan 1, 2027. Need executed paperwork by Dec 15.

 -  Doug Casey, Coastline Insurance

As you know, the carrier did a class-code review across the trades book in October, and the inputs they used assume a payroll growth path of roughly 18% off the 2025 baseline. With that assumption baked in, the preliminary indication came back at:

- General Liability:    $4,820 (up from $4,180, +15.3%)
- Workers Compensation: $7,940 (up from $6,920, +14.7%)

Important caveat: the +18% payroll assumption was derived from a Q2 conversation and not refreshed for actual Q3 and Q4 numbers. If actual payroll comes in materially under that, the indication should soften. Send me a Gusto YTD pull and I can push back on it.

Renewal effective Jan 1, 2027. Need executed paperwork by Dec 15.

 -  Doug Casey, Coastline Insurance
